title: Mystery Creepazoid Theater
description: Tales of inexplicable events. Events which cannot be explained in normal, scientific terms.
quote: We’ve got to get out of here, Sheila, before we become slime-sucking space aliens!
altHero: man is shocked when a woman turns around with an alien face
alt1: people, a cow, and a cat are floating above the street with empty, wide eyes and open mouths
alt2: man with bloodshot eyes and open mouth with tongue hanging out
alt3: man puts his hand on a woman’s shoulder, while she faces away
alt4: man screaming with the full moon behind
